name: Snow Drop Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites in a mixer bowl until soft peaks form.
2. Add cream of tartar and vanilla extract, then beat until stiff peaks form.
3. Gradually add sugar, 2 tablespoons at a time, beating after each addition.
4. Gently fold in the mini chocolate chips.
5. Drop mixture by heaping teaspoonfuls onto an ungreased foil-lined baking sheet.
6. Bake at 250°F for 20 to 25 minutes, or until pale cream in color and slightly soft on top.
7. Makes 36 cookies.
8. Each cookie contains about: 24 calories; 6 mg sodium; 0 cholesterol; trace fat; 5 grams carbohydrates; trace protein; 0 fiber; trace calories from fat.
